services.name: api-gateway
services.description: Main entry point, routes traffic to all downstream services

services.name: auth-service
services.description: Handles login, token validation, session management

services.name: order-service
services.description: Manages order creation, status updates, payment triggers

services.name: payments-service
services.description: Processes payments, talks to external payment gateway

services.name: inventory-service
services.description: Tracks stock levels, reserves items during checkout

services.name: fraud-service
services.description: ML-based fraud detection, called synchronously during payment

db_connection_exhaustion.log_pattern: ERROR: could not connect to database: too many clients already

memory_exhaustion.log_pattern: WARN: heap usage at 94%, GC overhead limit exceeded

oom_kill.log_pattern: FATAL: process killed by OOM killer, last allocation failed

high_latency.log_pattern: WARN: downstream call to dependency exceeded 5000ms timeout

cpu_exhaustion.log_pattern: WARN: CPU throttling detected, request queue growing

cache_failure.log_pattern: ERROR: Redis connection refused, falling back to database

external_timeout.log_pattern: ERROR: payment gateway timeout after 30000ms, circuit breaker open

playbooks.restart_service: Gracefully restart the service pods, waiting for health checks
playbooks.scale_db_connections: Increase connection pool size and add read replicas
playbooks.drain_traffic: Remove service from load balancer, drain existing connections
playbooks.enable_circuit_breaker: Enable circuit breaker on downstream calls, return fallback responses
playbooks.scale_horizontal: Add 3 additional pods to the service deployment
playbooks.switch_payment_provider: Route payments through backup provider, disable primary
playbooks.restart_cache: Flush and restart Redis cluster, warm up cache
playbooks.rollback_deploy: Roll back to previous stable container image
